name: Honest Ads Parody
trigger: Subverts polished ad with brutal honesty
why_it_works: Promising the unfiltered truth about a recognizable brand instantly hooks anyone with an opinion on it.

name: Relatable Parenting Confession
trigger: Names a shared, slightly taboo daily struggle
template: This is what we do every time [RELATABLE EVERYDAY STRUGGLE]
why_it_works: A specific everyday moment a huge niche personally experiences pulls them in to see if it matches their own life.
examples: This is what we do every time our daughter poops

name: Celebrity Reaction Reveal
trigger: Withholds what a famous person said
template: When I woke up and saw what [CELEBRITY] commented on my video I couldn't believe it
why_it_works: Dangling an unknown reaction from a celebrity creates an irresistible need to know what they said.
examples: When I woke up and saw what Ryan Reynolds commented on my video I couldn't believe it..
